channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ecuador’s Noboa pledges to extradite criminals in State of the Union speech
item.description: The right-wing president highlighted anti-crime operations and economic progress, while critics warned of abuses.

item.title: Cuba thanks China for rice shipment amid worsening humanitarian conditions
item.description: The Caribbean island has faced a fuel blockade that has cut off essential supplies, as Trump seeks regime change.

item.title: Inside a Beirut barbershop shaped by war and crisis
item.description: For nearly 20 years, Mario Habib has run a barbershop through wars, economic collapse and political crisis in Lebanon.

item.title: After San Diego shooting, Muslim Americans aim to turn grief into action
item.description: More than 25,000 US Muslims have come together for the annual ICNA conference, where speakers encouraged activism.

item.title: Pakistan’s Eid livestock traders losing as war on Iran pushes up prices
item.description: Livestock traders in Pakistan say the war on Iran has hurt their sales ahead of Eid al-Adha.

item.title: Senegal parliament speaker steps down as political crisis worsens
item.description: The move by speaker El Malick Ndiaye clears the way for sacked premier Ousmane Sonko to run for head of parliament.

item.title: ‘Trump needs a deal, no matter how bad it is’
item.description: Harlan Ullman argues that US President Donald Trump is chasing any Iran deal to relieve mounting pressure at home.

item.title: Ebola spreads in the DRC as authorities struggle to contain outbreak
item.description: The Ebola outbreak in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo is spreading as cases been confirmed in Uganda.

item.title: How will Iran war fallout impact upcoming US elections?
item.description: Trump purges Republican critics, but are the prospects for his party in upcoming elections heading up or down?

item.title: Israeli strikes kill six in southern Lebanon amid fresh evacuation orders
item.description: Israel's attacks in southern Lebanon are expanding despite supposed ceasefire.

item.title: Zelenskyy speaks to Al Jazeera at site of major Russian attacks in Kyiv
item.description: Russia has launched one of its largest attacks on Kyiv since the war began, firing hundreds of drones and missiles.

item.title: Fatou Bensouda on Israeli threats against her and the ICC
item.description: The court's former chief prosecutor says justice is being sacrificed to political interests.

item.title: West Ham go down as Salah and Guardiola make emotional Premier League exits
item.description: Tottenham secure Premier League survival with 1-0 win over Everton as West Ham's 14-year stay in top division ends.

item.title: Iran team trains through World Cup uncertainty
item.description: Al Jazeera exclusive footage follows Iran’s national football team as they train for the World Cup in Turkiye.

item.title: Turkish police storm main opposition CHP’s party headquarters
item.description: Violence erupted after Turkish police stormed the headquarters of the main opposition CHP party in Ankara.

item.title: China’s Shenzhou-23 astronauts blast off on space station mission
item.description: China’s Shenzhou-23 astronauts blast off on space station mission.

item.title: Iran recounts historic battles in response to Trump’s talk of agreement
item.description: Iran cites battles from history in response to Trump's latest comments on an imminent deal between the US and Iran.

item.title: ‘A paper city’: New York ‘library’ hosts 3.5 million pages of Epstein files
item.description: A US 'library' holding 3.5 million pages of documents attempts to bring accountability for victims of Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: China sends aid to Cuba amid a harsh US blockade
item.description: China sends aid to Cuba amid a harsh US blockade.

item.title: Bahrain jails nine defendants for life for ‘cooperating’ with Iran’s IRGC
item.description: Convictions come amid an intensified crackdown by Bahraini authorities on individuals accused of having ties to Tehran.

item.title: France bans Ben-Gvir: Which other Israeli leaders have been penalised?
item.description: France bans the Israeli far-right minister after his 'unspeakable' behaviour against arrested Gaza flotilla activists.

item.title: For third year in a row, Israel blocks Hajj pilgrimage for Gaza Muslims
item.description: As millions of Muslims gather in Mecca, Palestinians in Gaza face a third year of heartbreak as Israel has shut border.

item.title: Syria cannot heal without a rebuilt health system
item.description: Many Syrian returnees cannot access proper healthcare. Urgent action is required for Syria’s health system to recover.

item.title: ‘We won’t know who won until final outcome of US-Iran ceasefire’
item.description: ‘We won't know who won until final outcome of US-Iran ceasefire’

item.title: Will the Texas primary run-off give Democrats a chance to flip the state?
item.description: Paxton, the likely Republican nominee, is considered less likely to fare well against Democratic nominee in midterms.
